g.text: Amenity scans a directory, classifies each file by extension, and
move selected files into category-named subfolders (e.g., pdf/, im
• Navigate the file list with ↑/↓ arrow keys
• Toggle selection with Space or click
• Toggle all with the Select All / Deselect All buttons
• Press GO to move all selected files into their category folder
• Existing files at the destination are skipped automatically
pdf · img · word · xls · json · html · archive · text · code · v
